title: Construction Project Manager (Experienced with Landed Properties) – Up to $6,500
description:
• Position      : Construction Project Manager (Experienced with Landed Properties) – Up to $6,500
  • Location      : Singapore
  • Working hours    : Monday to Friday 9am to 6pm & Saturday 9am to 1pm   
  • Salary (commensurate with experience)     : Up to $6,500 + Variable Bonus + Annual Leaves + Medical Leaves + Medical Claims
  • Duration      : Permanent
  • Industry      : Building Construction

Main Responsibilities:

  • Manage and oversee construction projects from start to completion, ensuring adherence to budget, schedule, and quality standards.
  • Coordinate with clients, consultants, subcontractors, and site teams to ensure smooth project execution.
  • Develop and monitor project schedules, addressing potential risks and implementing corrective actions.
  • Ensure compliance with local building regulations, safety requirements, and authority approvals.
  • Review project drawings, identify discrepancies, and provide site-based solutions.
  • Conduct site inspections to ensure workmanship meets required standards and specifications.
  • Manage project costs, control variations, and optimize resource allocation.
  • Prepare progress reports, documentation, and updates for management and clients.
  • Lead problem-solving efforts to address site challenges and unforeseen issues.

Requirements:

  • Bachelor's Degree/Diploma in Civil Engineering, Architecture, Construction Management, or a related field.
  • Minimum 8 years of experience in construction project management, preferably in A&A and landed house projects.
  • Familiar with construction processes, local building regulations, contract administration, and safety standards.
  • Proficient in MS Project and MS Office

Email to: chloe@searchpersonnel.com.sg

***We do not charge our candidates any referral fee nor bind them with any contract.***

Chloe Ong

Associate Consulting Director (APAC)

Reg no.: R22105510

EA No: 13C6684

postedCompany.description:
SEARCH PERSONNEL PRIVATE LIMITED

 

Search Personnel is an established, leading and reputable recruitment company that brings effective services to individuals and organisations with a sense of urgency and commitment.


The thought behind Search Personnel is to deliver a specialized, high quality recruitment service.


With Search Personnel you can expect a level of quality and professionalism from experts who know recruitment and understand the market. With a team of experienced recruitment consultants, we can exploit into years of local recruitment experience and expertise. This enables us to bring the best roles and the best candidates together.


Our Services:

  • Executive Search (Headhunting)
  • Permanent Staffing
  • Payroll Processing Service
  • Contract Staffing
  • Temporary Staffing and Casual Workers
  • Foreign Recruitment (Overseas placements)

Awarded:

Awarded:

Voted by our valued clients and the public, HR Vendors of the Year Awards is one of Asia’s largest award shows dedicated to celebrating the achievements of organizations that do their best in serving the HR professionals.


We are not only providing recruitment services but also solutions to employers in talent management, from employee’s on-boarding, performance management, to retention.


Please note that your response to this advertisement and communications with us pursuant to this advertisement will constitute informed consent to the collection, use and/or disclosure of personal data by Search Personnel Private Limited for the purpose of carrying out its business, in compliance with the relevant provisions of the Personal Data Protection Act 2012.
